name: devopsdowntime
description: Static website for the DevOps Downtime community meetup.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -a --exclude='.git' --exclude='.github' --exclude='dist' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='*.zip' --exclude='.gitignore' --exclude='package.json' --exclude='package-lock.json' --exclude='wrangler.toml' --exclude='.DS_Store' ./ dist/
